programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon seek hidden treasures in West Covina, Calif.; Ivy searches for low-level merchandise; Dave makes a first-class find.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers face 10 vaults belonging to the same owner; Ivy draws a nice profit; Mary and Kenny do all of the heavy lifting.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy searches for high-end lockers; Rene and Casey clash over purchases; things get hairy for Jarrod and Brandi; Darrell plays old-fashioned pranks on his rivals.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod has difficulty finding his groove in Riverside, Calif.; an item stumps Dave; Ivy tries a new strategy; Mary discovers the romantic side of purchasing lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry Weiss and his cohort, Kenny, share behind-the scenes moments and commentary from favorite episodes of the series.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Ship Just Hit the Sand
programme.desc: The buyers snap up lockers in Irvine, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi continue their hot streak, while Barry is off his game.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny treats Perris, Calif., like a European vacation, picking up women along the way; Jarrod's lousy locker doesn't offer him any protection; Rene's tools end up being older than he expects.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Costa Mesa, Calif.; Ivy goes all in; Darrell uncovers a major collectible; Barry bets against himself and wins.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi rescues a loose pooch from oncoming traffic in Riverside, Calif.; Darrell's unit confirms his Magic Bullet Theory; Kenny's locker contains a shiny score.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Huntington Beach, Calif.; Barry introduces kitsch king Charles Phoenix to the joys of an auction; Darrell loses his home-field advantage.

programme.desc: The father-and-son team of Darrell and Brandon Sheets gambles on units in this collection from the "Storage Wars" archives.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers battle for the best unit available in Torrance, Calif.; Ivy finds success when he changes tactics; Brandi puts Jarrod on a budget.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny feels nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not be a good idea; Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way; Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name-brand goodies.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi have fun as they try to dunk the competition; Casey tries her hand at bidding; Ivy turns his store into an auction house.

programme.desc: Rene brings Gunther along to West Covina, Calif., for moral support, but gets annoyed when the older German will not take sides; Darrell stumbles over a potential diamond in the rough; Brandi and Jarrod discover a different national pastime.

programme.desc: Dan and Laura face tough competition in the neighborhood of North Hollywood; Dave's locker may be a hit; Mary eyes two units that, if purchased together, would make a perfect fit.

programme.title: Venganza contra Reloj
programme.desc: Alfonso un joven trabajador es recluido en una prisiÃ³n a causa de un robo que no cometiÃ³. NohemÃ­ hija de un millonario (Don Carlos) decide vengarse por el desprecio de Alfonso y al mismo tiempo su padre pueda cobrar el seguro por el robo. A falta de pruebas Alfonso sale de prisiÃ³n y por medio de una empleada de don Carlos se entera de que su familia es asesinada por un hijo de el.

programme.title: FURIA SALVAGE: EL CORRIDO DE JUAN PASTOR
programme.desc: Un solo hombre se enfrentara ante todo para recuperar a su hijo… La ambicion lo despojo de sus tierras, intentaron aniquilarlo con todo no se detenian ante nada, pero el se enfrentara al poder.

programme.title: Los Tres Bandoleros
programme.desc: Esta es la historia de tres bandoleros que además de hacer sus fechorías logran inculpar a integrantes de otra familia quienes recorren ferias y poblados hasta encontrar a los verdaderos culpables. carreras de caballos, exposiciones ganaderas y muchas fiestas.

programme.title: Seducciones Perversas
programme.desc: Un feliz matrimonio llega a su casa de playa a pasar unas vacaciones con otra pareja de amigos de ellos. la mucama encargada de cuidar su casa los recibe con mucha familiaridad.los esposos por cuestiones de trabajo se tienen que regresar pronto. Mientras las mujeres, se ponen a frecuentar a sus amigas y a salir a los bares típicos de la playa.las 5 mujeres protagonistas de esta historia, se van descubriendo a si mismas, hasta llegar a límites insospechados.la dueña de la casa es secuestrada por su propia mucama quien esta enamorada de ella y poco a poco va eliminando a sus amigas.suspenso, amor, sexo, crímenes, en una sola historia.

programme.title: The Boys Of The Ghost Town
programme.desc: Danny Ortega es encarcelado por un crimen de justicia desde muy joven. DespuÃ©s de 17 aÃ±os de prisiÃ³n, retorna a su pueblo en Houston donde se encuentra con que el crimen y las drogas han destruido lo que alguna vez llamo hogar. Cuando intenta reconstruir su vida, la lujuria por el poder lo sumerge en el mundo que siempre odio.

programme.title: La Ruletera
programme.desc: Una joven muchacha y agraciada físicamente, huérfana de padre y madre, se crio con su abuelo de oficio ruletero el cual al morir le deja como única herencia el "taxi" por lo que la joven se tiene que meter a trabajar de ruletera y de esa forma comienza a correr una serie de aventuras y situaciones, acompañada casi siempre de su ángel guardián que es su novio de oficio policía

programme.title: Bastardos
programme.desc: El voragine de una vida artistica turbulenta, una sensual bailarina tuvo tres hijos naturales, pero los niÃ±os crecen y ansiosos exigen conocer a su padre. tres bellas voces, tres sentimientos heridos cantando reclamaron el por que de ser bastardos.

programme.title: Los Camaroneros
programme.desc: Manuel es honesto líder del gremio de pescadores camaroneros que se enfrenta a los dueños de las embarcaciones y se enamora de Olivia, hija de Álvaro, uno de sus contrarios. Él impulsa la creación de una cooperativa de trabajadores, pero Álvaro y sus socios le proponen financiar la compra de un barco para él a cambio de que olvide la cooperativa, pues no les conviene la competencia.

programme.title: Leyenda de un Pistolero
programme.desc: El mejor pistolero de la región, enseña y educa a su único hijo para que siga sus pasos, enfrentándose a todo tipo de asesinos, sin embargo, aparece uno que es igual o mejor que ellos, quien secuestra a la novia de su hijo y la lleva por caminos inimaginables, desencadenándose una historia amor y terror al mismo tiempo.

programme.title: Este Vampiro es un Tiro
programme.desc: Un vampiro vive en una hacienda abandonada y se aburre así que se va en busca de aventuras al pueblo.

programme.title: Los Cargadores
programme.desc: Estos trabajadores metidos a cargadores, empezaron desde muy abajo en la escala social, pero un buen dÃ­a se fijaron una meta, aunque tardaron mas tiempo del debido en alcanzarla, ya que algunas veces cuando terminaban con la obligacion, seguian con la "devociÃ³n" de decir "salud" y divertirse a su manera, para olvidar un poco sus penas; al alcanzar la ansiada meta, empiezan a tener otra clase de "amigos" que con el cuento de querer ayudarlos, solo sirven para perjudicarlos

programme.title: El Coyote Mente Diabolica
programme.desc: Bulmaro Reyes comandante retirado de la policía, debido a su violento carácter que quiso asesinar al hombre que mato a su familia, se ve obligado a ir en busca de aquel hombre que se ha fugado y que por sanguinario le llaman el coyote. apoyado por su excompañero en la policía, el comandante Ríos inicia una insólita persecución a caballo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: La Ley de mi Texana
programme.desc: El padre de Juan Manuel fue asesinado años atrás, él vio el crimen y testificó en contra del asesino al que condenaron a prisión. Juan Manuel guarda dentro de su texana una onza de plata que le regaló su padre.

programme.title: Homeboy
programme.desc: Academy Award®-nominee Mickey Rourke (The Wrestler) delivers one of his strongest performances as Johnny Walker, a washed-up boxer looking for one more shot in the ring. With hard-hitting fight scenes, gritty drama and a knockout performance by Oscar® winner Christopher Walken, Homeboy is an unforgettable film about a man who refuses to give up on his last chance to make good.

programme.title: Yakuza Wolf
programme.desc: The son of a murder crime boss exacts his revenge by pitting two rival clans against each other.

programme.title: Season Of The Witch
programme.desc: A 14th-century Crusader returns to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. A beleaguered church, deeming sorcery the culprit of the plague, commands the two knights to transport an accused witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence. A priest, a grieving knight, a disgraced itinerant and a headstrong youth who can only dream of becoming a knight join a mission troubled by mythically hostile wilderness and fierce contention over the fate of the girl. When the embattled party arrives at the abbey, a horrific discovery jeopardises the knight's pledge to ensure the girl fair treatment, and pits them against an inexplicably powerful and destructive force.

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization
programme.desc: Penelope Spheeris' The Decline Of Western Civilization is a riveting, unflinching and hard-core film which adeptly captures the spirit of a major cultural phenomenon. Including performances by X, Circle Jerks, Black Flag, Catholic Discipline, Germs and Alice Bag Band. Breaking down barriers of expression and social mores, the Decline punks were against everything: They gave birth to an anti-establishment view of the world that permeates today's music, politics, social attitudes, styles and trends. The film documents their deliberate reaction to the mass commercialism of music; it is a blatant and angry rejection of the mainstream. Burgeoning at the time, many of the punk bands first seen here have become legendary. The effect of the film on current day music, styles and trends is immeasurable.

programme.title: Children Of The Corn
programme.desc: A young couple is trapped in a remote town with a dangerous religious cult of children.

programme.title: Bloodfist
programme.desc: Don Wilson plays retired kickboxer Jake Raye, who travels to Manila, where his brother is favored to win a kickboxing competition.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: Then Came You tells the story of Skye (Maisie Williams, Game Of Thrones), a spunky teenager with a terminal illness who befriends Calvin (Asa Butterfield, Ender's Game), a 19-year old hypochondriac who is afraid of his own shadow. Calvin helps Skye carry out her eccentric bucket list and, in the process, learns to confront and conquer his own fears ... including falling in love with the beautiful, but seemingly untouchable, Izzy (Nina Dobrev, The Vampire Diaries).

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Alligator
programme.desc: A baby alligator is flushed down a Chicago toilet and survives by eating discarded laboratory rats injected with growth hormones. The small reptile grows gigantic, escapes the city sewers, and goes on a rampage.

programme.title: Basquiat
programme.desc: The brief life of Jean Michel Basquiat, a world renowned New York street artist struggling with fame, drugs and his identity.

programme.title: StarCrash
programme.desc: While running from the authorities, a pair of smugglers are recruited by The Emperor to rescue his missing son while they track down a mysterious super weapon designed by an evil Count. Their wild adventure takes them through time and space as they battle giant robots, cavemen and amazons.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Her Smell
programme.desc: A self-destructive punk rocker struggles with sobriety while trying to recapture the creative inspiration that led her band to success.

programme.title: Her Smell
programme.desc: A self-destructive punk rocker struggles with sobriety while trying to recapture the creative inspiration that led her band to success.

programme.title: The Company of Wolves
programme.desc: A teenage girl in a country manor falls asleep while reading a magazine, and has a disturbing dream involving wolves prowling the woods below her bedroom window.

programme.title: Legionnaire
programme.desc: Alain is a boxer in 1925 Marseille, France. When he doesn't take the dive paid to take by a mob boss, he has to split. He joins the Foreign Legion and is sent to Morocco. He makes 3 friends and they watch each other's backs.

programme.title: White Zombie
programme.desc: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.

programme.title: Justin Bieber's Believe
programme.desc: Experience Justin Bieber's real story in this compelling documentary featuring thrilling never-before-seen concert footage, behind-the-scenes access and special appearances.

programme.title: The Stunt Man
programme.desc: Running from the law, Vietnam vet Cameron stumbles on a movie shoot just in time to interfere with a staged accident, causing the stunt man's death. Rather than turn Cameron in, director Eli Cross makes him an offer he can't refuse: replace the dead stunt man in return for safe harbor.

programme.title: Blind Dating
programme.desc: A blind young man (Pine) thinks he finds love with an Indian woman (Jay), though their relationship is fraught with cultural differences.

programme.title: Brain On Fire
programme.desc: A young, capable professional cannot explain her newly erratic behavior.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: From Stephenie Meyer, the creator of the worldwide phenomenon The Twilight Saga, comes this daring and romantic thriller based on the bestselling novel. When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world. The Host is a passionate and powerful epic love story.

programme.title: Deadly Outlaw Rekka
programme.desc: When his beloved boss is killed, a dangerous young gangster cuts a path of vengeance through the Japanese mafia.

programme.title: Drugstore June
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her town is robbed, a girl takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a bloodthirsty, flesh-eating breed of monsters who are ravaging the East Coast of the United States.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Alors que Manon a des remords, Claire place Marc face à ses mensonges.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil

programme.title: Un si grand soleil

programme.title: Un si grand soleil

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Tandis que Claire prend tous les risques, Arthur aurait-il une touche avec Anissa ?

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Alors qu'une femme porte plainte contre Marie, Mo retrouve un ami de longue date.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Alors qu'Elisabeth met sa vengeance à exécution, Arthur tente de se rapprocher de Léa.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Guilhem Cabestan est contraint de faire certaines révélations.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Mo se prépare à livrer un difficile combat et la trêve entre Julien et Élisabeth vole en éclats.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Pour marquer des points, Arthur se fait passer pour celui qu'il n'est pas.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Adèle obtient de l'aide, et Lucille a une bonne raison de se déclarer malade.

programme.desc: Mo est confrontée aux conséquences des agissements d'Enric; Arthur passe à la vitesse supérieure.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil
programme.desc: Adèle perd tout contrôle sur elle-même; Antonin, lui, ne peut s'empêcher de jouer avec le feu.

programme.desc: Victor subit les conséquences de ses fautes passées, Mo fait une rencontre.

programme.title: Un si grand soleil

programme.title: Chic en VF
programme.desc: In the heart of the 14th arrondissement of Paris, the Chana Orloff studio-museum presents a collection of works by the French-Israeli sculptor. Encounter with Basile Boon, artist with an overflowing imagination.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.sub-title: Life in a tepee tiny house
programme.desc: After visiting Julien's base camp, we head back on the road to adventure with a trip to meet Serge Beaudette, a nature-lover who has now spent over seven years living off-grid in his tiny house in the shape of a tepee.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: The designer Mossi Traoré discusses his 2023-2024 autumn-winter ready to wear collection, featuring the theme of dancing on the moon! A completely new take on cosmopolitan clothing...

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S09
programme.desc: The Cluny Museum recounts the history of the Middle Ages. Oversized lamps, pop art seating with sparkle, Léa Mestres explores colour and volumes. Tanne Vinter takes over the reins as designer for Rains. Atelier Stokowski: the adventure of three brothers who fell in love with glass.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: Dempster Highway crosses the territory of the Tr'ond‘k Hw‘ch'in, an Indian tribe of the Yukon, also known as the Han. Allison and her mother Dolores introduce the two friends several aspects of their culture and the history of their people.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.sub-title: Lucien Gau, bronze creation and restoration
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: Chic en VF
programme.desc: Alice Guittard brings marble vibrantly alive using different shapes and colour to create each motif. Anton Laborde brings a fresh approach to wood marquetry.

programme.title: La grande galerie de la Francophonie
programme.sub-title: Isabelle Carre, Basile Alaoui, Roxane Mbanga
programme.desc: She is an actress who touches the heart. A César, two Molières and almost seventy films in a career spanning thirty-five years, Isabelle Carré is releasing "Les Rêveurs", her first film as a director, and it's big news! An 11-year-old prodigy, Basile Alaoui publishes his drawings on social networks and has already been noticed by the experts at "La Grande Galerie Francophone". When do you become an artist? How do you spot precocious talent? Here are some answers. Roxane Mbanga also takes a look at the place of black women in contemporary art. Finally, Alex Vizorek draws a portrait of the American painter John Singer Sargent.

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: La Galerie Dior retraces the story of the famous French haute couture house, a tribute to the genius of Christian Dior and his successors. All about French lawyers' robes. L'Ingénieur Chevallier, the oldest French opticians, takes over Maison Bonnet, flagship of luxury eyewear. Wearing a bra as a top.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S09
programme.sub-title: Special programme: around and about in Lausanne
programme.desc: We explore the canton's fine arts museum and its collections. Michelin-starred chef Franck Giovannini unpacks his bags in Crissier, in the canton of Vaud. With Viktor & Rolf, dresses and acres of tulle are turning heads. We meet Alexandre and Martino, founders of Swiss Koo.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: For autumn-winter 2023-2024, the Barbara Bui collection is presented in the form of small, slow motion clips. Tailoring, a pop-rock spirit and nonconformism await us.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: Legendary and highly recommended: L'Éclaireur, the concept store by Armand Hadida. All about the origins of the carat, the unit of measurement that governs the jewellery industry. Anicet: starting from what already exists and offering a new life to jewellery. Shorts and skirts: the elegant way to wear ultra-short hemlines.

programme.title: Chic en VF
programme.desc: The New National Museum of Monaco offers a showcase for contemporary art. Sommelier Patrice Frank recounts the story of a cellar unlike any other.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.desc: Julien meets Joanie and Hugues, two former members of the armed forces, just a few days be-fore they set sail for the southern seas. Aboard their catamaran, they plan to spend five years seeking out the finest kitesurfing spots around the globe.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: Lyn Abdel Rahman presents Le Fil Paris, the brand she founded with Filza Marri, featuring a responsible philosophy focused on human beings and zero waste and with an initial fashion show in tribute to Lebanon and Pakistan.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: Between craftwork and tradition, we visit the Basque and History of Bayonne Museum. The mosaic artist Anne-Cécile Lopez reinterprets an age-old art, at the crossroads between archaeology, geology and anthropology. Marc Jacobs' anniversary show offers a contemporary view of the domestic world. Charlotte Franier restores old paintings.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: Last adventures in Tombstone Territorial Park: the duo decides to do some canoeing and a guided mountain hike. Halfway through the hike, Nadia has to give up but Vincent makes it to the summit.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.sub-title: Ivana Barbarito and Benjamin Bancel, architects and designers
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: Hélène Morbu, Marie-Amélie and Marie-Caroline Guillot, Annelise Michelson share one thing in common: ceramics. When the hand knows nothing but music: being a creator of notes. Meeting the leatherworkers: Valentine Huyghues Despointes and the craftsmen and women of Atelier Tassin. Milliners, cabinetmakers, fan-makers: Anthony Peto, Alain Taral, the Duvelleroy company.

programme.title: Chic en VF
programme.desc: The Cherqui Foundation, a collection of optical and cinematic artworks. Encounter with Jean-Guillaume Mathiaut, an artist whose work never fails to enchant, and his passion for architecture and cabinet-making.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.sub-title: A life of simplicity in the Acadian forest
programme.desc: Julien is welcomed by Anne Galant who hand-built her house on Prince Edward Island. She shares her story and explains how it led to her living a simple life in a haven of peace and tran-quillity.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.sub-title: Demo de Mode - Julie de Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: At kilometer 371 of Dempster Highway, Nadia and Vincent treat themselves to some creature comforts at the Eagle Plains hotel. They make the acquaintance of Steve, a truck driver and philosopher. Finally, they meet up with Jesse for a bike ride of 34 kilometers.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: Avenue Marceau, Paris, the Yves Saint Laurent Museum is dedicated to the great French fashion designer. Chef Philip Chronopoulos officiates beneath the arcades of the Palais Royal. Jean Paul Gaultier invites Simone Rocha to bring a new look to the fashion house's archives. Featherworker Valérie Tanfin makes nature sublime.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: La grande galerie de la Francophonie
programme.desc: Hundreds of thousands of albums sold, a Cat who has been making us laugh and think for over forty years... The Belgian star of the comic strip is also an art enthusiast, and Philippe Geluck is our guest. Originally from Togo, this incredibly gifted artist made the headlines at the "As Known as Africa" fair in Paris, and has established herself as one of the leading figures in contemporary art. Atsoupé is with us. Finally, Alex Vizorek casts his expert eye over the paintings of Philip Guston.

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: The Lenôtre cookery school, passing on the passion for the culinary arts that drove its founder, the illustrious Gaston Lenôtre. A footwear institution that bears the name of a London district: the Chelsea boot. FONT&ROMANI or the art of high-end rug-making using the Savonnerie technique. The elegance of draping.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: The Philharmonie de Paris is home to a museum dedicated to music. Vincent Garnier Pressiat's audacious fashion style permeates the French capital. Fashion designer Thom Browne recounts stories inspired by Edgar Allan Poe. The meticulous and delicate art of ceramist Yuko Kuramatsu, adept of the technique of neriage.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: As a tribute to Maria Callas, filmed by Claude Lelouch at the Opera, Stéphane Rolland's show recreates the atmosphere of a 1950s gala evening. An autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection which focuses on the graphical aspects, the structure and black and white.

programme.title: Hunting and Nature Museum
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: Pool, table football... In France, René Pierre is the benchmark manufacturer for games tables. All about the bistro, everyday symbol of popular gastronomy. Encounter with Nicolas Jurnjack: when styling hair is also an opportunity for creativity and expression in the world of fashion. How to wear a corset.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.desc: Julien catches up with Anthony, a musician who's been living in a campervan for five years, spending summer in Halifax busking on the streets. It's a lifestyle that means he has to be able to constantly adapt.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called "Premier bouclier", a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: Nadia and Vincent hit the road again in the direction of the north-western territories. They arrive at Inuvik beneath the midnight sun. The adventure continues with a new guide, an Inuit this time. Kylik takes them to the Arctic village by boat.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: From 1685 to the modern-day: the collections of the Museum of the History of Immigration. In her studio, plastic artist Morgane Tschiember works and experiments with her materials. John Galliano brings travel and faraway places to the Maison Margiela runway show. Between fire and transparency, Thibaut Nussbaumer masters molten glass.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.sub-title: Bordeaux Decorative Arts and Design Museum
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.sub-title: Atelier MHP, marquetry over four generations
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: La grande galerie de la Francophonie
programme.sub-title: Daniel Buren, John Dodelande, Van Eyck
programme.desc: He is a superstar of contemporary art. His regular 8.7 cm strips have become iconic and he is acclaimed the world over, where each of his projects creates a stir. But how do you last and reinvent yourself after a sixty-five-year career? Daniel Buren is here to reveal his secrets. Can we all afford works by Vincent Van Gogh, Claude Monet or Henri Matisse? Will technology replace the great masters of art? But above all, is copying cheating? John Dodelande, the man who reproduces masterpieces, is here to talk about them. Hector Obalk discusses a work by Van Eyck (1435), while Alex Vizorek casts his expert eye over the paintings of German painter Gerhart Richter.

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: For its cruise collection Dior offers a celebration of Indian craftwork and high precision expertise. "Payment in cash": in France it's an expression that is becoming increasingly rare. The designer Sarah-Linda Forrer gives Limoges porcelain an up-to-date look. The colour pink is also for menswear.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: The apartments of Louis XV's intendants in the Hôtel de la Marine. Between art and interior decoration, designer Ingrid Donat blends style and material to perfection. Alexander McQueen: a personality expressed through mystical romanticism. Between poetry and transparency: Atelier Stokowski, or the adventure of three brothers, master glassworkers.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: Humour, fantasy and a flair for the spectacular all describe Victor Weinsanto's designs. He presents his autumn-winter 2023-2024 ready to wear show.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: The Révélations craft fair celebrates 10 years at the ephemeral Grand Palais, showcasing the virtuosity of the creative professions. All about the origins of carpaccio. The famous culinary guide Gault & Millau has now been advising lovers of French gastronomy for fifty years. Classic or fun, wearing a brooch.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.desc: Julien sets off to the Lower Saint Lawrence to meet RŽmi, NoŽmie and their little daughter Au-rŽlie, and discover their lifestyle. Skilled wood-workers, today they occupy the house they built themselves and are able to live on the money their art brings in.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: The designer and ambassador for African fabric Imane Ayissi presents his haute couture collection for the autumn-winter 2023-2024 season.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: With the help of a historian and Gerry, Kylik's uncle, Nadia and Vincent retrace the steps of Albert Johnson, known as the "mad trapper". They go to Aklavik, the starting point of a manhunt lasting 48 days which fascinated the public back in 1932.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.sub-title: Aurelie Galois / Agnes Kappler's tarot cards
programme.desc: The Hôtel de la Marine, Paris, covers two hundred and fifty years of naval history. Multi-talented artist, Aurélie Galois paints industrial canvases in rubber, just like little secret boxes. Designer Peter Do: for the love of material and the perfect cut. Agnès Kappler makes tarot cards the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: The Decorative Arts Museum pays tribute to Iris Van Herpen: a look back at the career of an exceptional fashion designer. A rare and creative vision: for Arthur Avellano latex is all. Maison RD, one of the last bastions of Parisian feather-working, revived by the arrival of a gifted designer.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.sub-title: The Ritz, a luxury hotel with a majestic history
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.desc: In Rivire-ˆ-Claude, Julien discovers an open-air cooperative set up by Antoine. Totally off-grid ten young adults live there, each participating fully in all the projects: from household tasks to creating a garden.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: We look back at the 2023 Africa Fashion Up, the leading Parisian event for African fashion, in the company of Val_rie Ka, the woman behind its creation, and Fabrice Zaady, guest designer from Cªte d'Ivoire.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: Inuvik, 3400 inhabitants, is the big town on Dempster Highway. There, Nadia and Vincent discover a church shaped like an igloo and the most northern mosque in the world. While gardening in the community greenhouse, they discuss the cost of life and food.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: Towns and buildings to discover at the Cité de l'Architecture et du Patrimoine. From the kitchens of the greatest chefs to that of the Lucas Carton Paris, the star-studded career of Hugo Bourny. Chemena Kamali takes control at Chloé. Interior decorator, Éloïse d'Argent brings sublime style to ceilings and walls.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.sub-title: Miu Miu by Miuccia Prada, spring-summer 2022
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: Les Journées Particulières by LVMH: perspectives for the craft professions in the world of fashion. The story of sauerkraut, a journey from China to Alsace. Graphic artist Sarah Naud and her sculptures in cement. How to get the biker look. Dgena Mouclier and upcycled menswear fashion.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.sub-title: History of the jeweller Fred, a magical exhibition
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: La grande galerie de la Francophonie
programme.desc: Our first guest is an actress and artist with a passion for drawing, painting and photography... Louise Bourgoin will tell us why art is her refuge and her place of freedom. We're also joined by Dhewadi Hadjab, an artist who has become a key figure, exhibited in some of the biggest galleries, and whose paintings explore the movement of bodies in space. The Vizorek'xpert chronicle: Niki de Saint Phalle as seen by Alex Vizorek.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.sub-title: Demo de Mode - Louis Gabriel Nouchi
programme.desc: Viviane welcomes her first menswear designer! Louis Gabriel Nouchi presents his 2023-2024 autumn-winter collection, inspired by the novel "American Psycho" by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: A visit to the Trotting Museum at the Domaine de Grosbois. Worthy heir to the Nabi movement, the painter Nathanaëlle Herbelin invites us into her studio. Adrian Appiolaza is artistic director for Maison Moschino. Nature's organic shapes are omnipresent in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goléo.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: A visit to the Trotting Museum at the Domaine de Grosbois. Worthy heir to the Nabi movement, the painter Nathanaëlle Herbelin invites us into her studio. Adrian Appiolaza is artistic director for Maison Moschino. Nature's organic shapes are omnipresent in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goléo.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.sub-title: Life in a yurt as a family of 5
programme.desc: Julien heads off to meet Audrey and Michael, who settled in the Yukon in an off-grid yurt with their three young children. He discovers the family's daily routine, a life filled with challenges and all the ingenuity necessary to overcome them.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: Nadia and Vincent have finally arrived in Tuktoyaktuk. In the company of Michle and Bruce, they discover the lifestyle of the inhabitants. The traditions are strong but will they survive now that Dempster Highway links this community to the rest of Canada?

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: A visit to the National Picasso-Paris Museum. Pastry chef and baker, Benoît Castel delights in sharing his culinary philosophy. For the English designer Molly Goddard, clarity rhymes with complexity: fashion that pays tribute to the art of corsetry. The craftsman Pascal Le Bonhomme recounts his passion for globes.

programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: Chargeurs Réunis, a company at the cutting edge of textile innovation. Do you know why the bicycle used to be known as "the little queen"? At MHP, the Poisson family restores Boulle work furniture and objects. The hooded dress makes a comeback. Charlie Le Mindu combines fashion and haute coiffure.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.sub-title: Demo de Mode - Louis Gabriel Nouchi
programme.desc: For the 2024 spring-summer season, Louis Gabriel Nouchi's collection once has its roots in the world of literature. The designer pays tribute to Christopher Isherwood's novel "A Single Man", published in 1964.

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: The Ritz: more than just a hotel, a global brand. All about the origins of the word "Fashion". Jérôme Lair makes and restores stringed instruments. Wearing Klein blue. We join Texto Dallas in his studio, where he transforms nails into veritable works of art!

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.sub-title: Psychanalysis of a four-legged piece of furniture
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: De Castelbajac / Hamdad / Chardin
programme.desc: He is one of the world's best-known designers. He has explored all the arts, turned fashion into a field for artistic expression, created dress artworks, drawn angels' faces... The exhibition "Imagination in Power" is dedicated to him at Les Abattoirs in Toulouse. Welcome to Jean-Charles de Castelbajac! He has become a leading painter, whose paintings resemble real photographs. Bilal Hamdad, 38, is exhibiting his powerful works at the Petit Palais in Paris. He tells us how art questions our societies and our times. A masterpiece by Jean Siméon Chardin deciphered by Alex Vizorek: that's the Vizorek'xpert feature.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: The designer Alexis Mabille presents his haute couture collection for the 2023-2024 autumn-winter season, delightfully lightweight

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: In the heart of Paris's 7th arrondissement, we visit the Custodia Foundation. Léa Zeroil fills interior spaces with her inspiration: a world where rooms cohabit in a harmony vibrant with energy. Clothing by Lemaire is useful, practical, rich in emotion. Interior designer and painter, Lucrèce Grapin transforms walls and ceilings.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S09
programme.desc: Magic and jewellery with a visit to the exhibition dedicated to the jeweller Fred Samuel. Margherita, the emblem of Neapolitan gastronomy that bears the name of a queen. Bootmaker Hervé Brunelle, the only remaining last-maker in France. The all-denim look. Robert Mercier sculpts and moulds leather.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.sub-title: Real or fake fur: it's all about balance
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.sub-title: Life as working nomads aboard an old school bus
programme.desc: SŽbastien and Thalie personally converted an old school bus into a home on wheels to alter-nate between work and discoveries as they travel. Julien joins them in the Yukon to try to un-derstand how they maintain an even balance in their new nomadic life.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: The designer Alexis Mabille presents his haute couture collection for the 2024 spring-summer season, an ode to sensuality and refinement.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: Nadia and Vincent meet Carmen and Nathan. These young filmmakers explain how the film that they made about climate change in their village made its way as far as the COP25.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, the Paul Belmondo Museum is dedicated to the sculptor's work. Interior designer Anne-Sophie Pailleret puts all her talent into the details. The designer Mike Amiri writes a stylish and eclectic history of his fashion house. With Domitille Basso, flowers leave their vases to express a very poetic beauty.

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: #VF
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: TENDANCE XXI S10
programme.desc: A look back at the highlights of the spring-summer 2024 haute couture shows with Dior, Schiaparelli, Imane Ayissi, Chanel, Stéphane Rolland, Simone Rocha for Jean Paul Gaultier, Maison Margiela. All about the first fashion model: a very French story. The best of men's fashion for the 2024-2025 autumn-winter season.

programme.title: L'ART ET LA MATIERE-S08
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: LA BELLE VIE S03
programme.sub-title: Life for those who love the Great North
programme.desc: Julien meets Fabien, Rapha‘lle and little Rose, a family who originally came from France to set up home with their sled dogs eight years ago. Today they live off-grid in the Yukon.

programme.title: Démo de Mode
programme.desc: He built his reputation and runway shows through his use of one material: latex. Arthur Avellano describes his 2024 spring-summer collection.

programme.title: HABITANTS DU NORD
programme.desc: After three days in Tuktoyaktuk, Vincent and Nadia prepare to leave. But before they do, they allow themselves a last few adventures. It is also time to take stock: the explorers reflect on their favourite moments of their trip.

programme.title: VERSION FRANCAISE-S10
programme.desc: From the 17th century to the modern day, the Paris Police Headquarters Museum recounts the history of the Préfecture de Police. Chef Nicolas Beaumann lights up Maison Rostang with his two stars. Undercover: casual fashion with inbuilt style. From gravestones to contemporary decorative art, Benjamin Nicco carves stone.
